headline: ServiceNow Security Incident Tests Core Workflow And AI Governance Story
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) has disclosed a security incident involving unauthorized access through a vulnerable API endpoint. The issue affected certain customer instances and prompted an urgent company wide security update and patch. Impacted clients have been notified directly as part of the response process. For investors watching ServiceNow at a share price of $106.06, this security event comes alongside mixed recent returns, with the stock down 10% over the past week but up 15.9% over the...
